Scyne Performance — Requirements Coverage

Visual walkthrough of every functionality, mapped to the requirements in req1.csv & req2.csv. Generated 23 Jun 2026.

22Functional screens
19GitHub tickets covered
44/44Requirement lines surfaced
Note: This is a front-end prototype with representative mock data. Every requirement has a complete, interactive UI surface. Actions that are inherently backend (sending emails, live analytics, real D365 sync, enforced authorization) are surfaced and interactive but not wired to live infrastructure.

01

Dashboard

Landing overview — My Goals, deadlines, team performance, recent feedback, and the notification bell entry point.

Requirements addressed

  • —Navigation hub and high-level KPIs. Entry point to every functional area.
02

My Goals — list

Personal goals with tracking, types, status and risk.

Requirements addressed

  • #481Import D365 Goals action available
  • #485Goal Type chips (Strategic / Individual / Team)
  • #490Inline status dropdown — Not Started / On Track / Needs Improvement / Completed / Cancelled
  • #482Progress %, milestone count (x/y), last check-in
  • RiskDeadline & risk indicators — Overdue, Due-soon-low-progress, On-track
  • #484Owner-only goal flagged "excluded from search/reporting"
03

Create Goal drawer

Full goal authoring with all required attributes.

Requirements addressed

  • #482Description, ≥1 quantifiable Measurement, Linked Activities, Link Received Feedback
  • #485Goal Type multi-select
  • #486Scyne Values tags (all 6)
  • #490Configurable Progress Tracking Type (Percentage / Status / Both)
  • #487Skills Passport Entities — full CRUD (create / rename / delete / link)
  • #484Visibility selector with live "rules applied" checklist
  • #482Optional Milestones; Submit for Approval / Save as Draft
04

Import from Dynamics 365

Bring historical goals into the system.

Requirements addressed

  • #481Import existing D365 goals — selectable list, progress & status preserved
05

Check-Ins

Progress update history across goals.

Requirements addressed

  • #482Progress Updates & History — date/time, updated value, optional comments, author
06

Goal History — Activity Log

Audit of goal activity.

Requirements addressed

  • #491Activity log entries — editing, completing, progress/status updates, TL review, import
07

Goal Detail

Single-goal tracking, milestones, history and visibility.

Requirements addressed

  • #482At-risk/overdue banner, visual indicator, Measurements, interactive Milestones
  • #482Progress update form + full history (date/time, value, status, note)
  • #484Visibility & enforced-rules checklist
  • #502Linked Performance Review reference
  • LeaderLeader visibility — view progress, cannot edit unless permitted
08

Company Goals — All Goals

Organisation objectives.

Requirements addressed

  • —Company objectives with pillar, owner, teams aligned, progress and status
09

Company Goals — By Strategic Pillar

Goals grouped by pillar.

Requirements addressed

  • —Per-pillar grouping with goal count, total teams aligned and average pillar progress
10

Company Goals — OKR Tree View

Objective → Key Results → aligned goals.

Requirements addressed

  • #502Alignment hierarchy: each Objective with its Key Results and aligned individual goals
11

Team Goals — Manager Review

Team-Leader review workflow.

Requirements addressed

  • #483Per-goal Approve / Request Changes / Reject / Comment actions
  • #483Submission-level status + Comments & Audit Trail
  • LeaderOpen review cycle banner — employees notified on review/update
12

Role Profiles

Standardised role expectations.

Requirements addressed

  • #501View standardised role profiles by grade/role
  • #501Filter/search by grade, role title, department
  • #501Responsibilities, competencies and performance indicators per role
13

Manager Review

Performance review workspace.

Requirements addressed

  • #502Associated goals (description, metrics, progress) shown during the review discussion
14

Feedback — Give

Give feedback & respond to requests.

Requirements addressed

  • —Give recognition/constructive/general feedback with visibility; open inbound 360° request
15

Feedback — Request + Reminders

Outbound requests and nudges.

Requirements addressed

  • #493Your feedback requests — respondent, role, anonymity, scope, competencies, due, status
  • #494Automated reminder schedule — T-5 / T-2 / Due / T+2 / T+7, 3-month nudge
  • #494Escalate overdue to TL toggle; stop on completion/cancellation
16

Request Feedback form

Structured feedback request.

Requirements addressed

  • #493Respondent typeahead from org directory (name/role)
  • #493Scope + linked roles & experiences; competencies & goals to assess; context
  • #493Due date (policy default) + visibility; task (email + in-app) on send
17

Scyne 360° Feedback Form

Structured respondent form.

Requirements addressed

  • #495Structured competency ratings + comments; time-to-complete indicator
  • #495Autosave + Save-as-draft; required-field validation
  • #495Visibility/privacy notice; optional attachments; audit events (opened/saved/submitted)
18

Feedback — Received

Inbound feedback handling.

Requirements addressed

  • #496Profile Timeline aggregation with tags & competencies
  • #496Export PDF/CSV; store in Skills Passport; acknowledge receipt
  • #496Visibility rules — hide/reveal respondent identity, masked scores
19

Feedback Insights & Benchmarks

Dashboards and peer comparison.

Requirements addressed

  • #497Requestor / TL / HR dashboards; filters; export CSV / XLSX / PDF
  • #497Completion SLA, competency heatmap, ratings distribution, theme/keyword clustering
  • #498Peer benchmark percentile bands ("Nth percentile vs peers")
  • #498Admin cohort definition, min sample size (privacy), smoothing period
20

Admin — Automation / Cadence

Review-cadence rules.

Requirements addressed

  • #488Annual goal-creation reminder + Quarterly goal-review reminder
  • #488Reminders auto-create a corresponding task in each user’s workspace
21

Admin — Notification Rules

Notification configuration.

Requirements addressed

  • #491TL reviewed/updated a goal → Goal Owner (email + in-app)
  • #488Annual / quarterly goal cadence notifications
  • #493 #496Feedback request received / feedback completed notifications
22

Notifications & Tasks center

In-app delivery of notifications and auto-created tasks.

Requirements addressed

  • #491 #483"Alex Reid reviewed your goal" — names goal & reviewer
  • #496"Feedback completed" notification to requestor
  • #493"New feedback request" notification
  • #488Cadence reminders + auto-created Tasks tab
Scyne Performance · Requirements coverage report · built from live application screenshots
